title: Enterprise AI Governance Supervisory Report
abstract: This report provides regulator-ready evidence for enterprise AI governance, model risk controls, and high-impact AI safety operations.

content.section: System boundaries, model inventory, and critical services.
Regulation-to-control mappings and control effectiveness evidence.
Independent validation, internal audit, and residual risk posture.
Material incidents, containment actions, and remediation closure status.
Executive and accountable senior manager attestations.
